keyFeatures.en: Easy to learn and use video and photo editing software
keyFeatures.zh: 易于学习和使用的视频和照片编辑软件

keyFeatures.en: Play video and connect with friends and co-workers
keyFeatures.zh: 播放视频并与朋友和同事联系

weaknesses.en: Pricing information is not clearly stated
Limited information about file size and credits
weaknesses.zh: 关于文件大小和积分的信息有限

targetAudience.en: Easy to learn and use for beginners and professionals
targetAudience.zh: 适用于初学者和专业人士，易于学习和使用

positioning.en: Leader in video and photo editing software with a user-friendly interface
positioning.zh: 视频和照片编辑软件的领导者，具有用户友好的界面
